---
title: "ledger.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/gungnir/ledger.py"
loc: 44
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.40
style_score: 3.61
intel_score: 6.85
overall_score: 5.26
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating LedgerManager, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import LedgerManager and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [uuid](file://uuid)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `LedgerManager`
- `execute`
